AdmissionApplication.title: Admission Application
AdmissionApplication.description: An online registration application submitted by a parent for primary school admission.

birthDate.description: Student's date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD.

parentName.description: Full name of the father, mother, or guardian.

parentPhone.description: Contact phone number of the parent.

parentEmail.description: Contact email address of the parent.

avatarUrl.description: Base64 or URL profile picture of the student.

birthCertUrl.description: Base64 or URL of the birth certificate document.

residenceCertUrl.description: Base64 or URL of proof of residence document.

status.description: Real-time verification status of the admission application.

statusNotes.description: Official comments from the admissions board regarding actions or feedback.

createdBy.description: UID of the user who submitted this registration.

createdAt.description: System timestamp when application was created.

updatedAt.description: System timestamp when status or records were updated.

SchoolAnnouncement.title: School Announcement
SchoolAnnouncement.description: Administrative announcements, registration guidelines, or news for parents.

important.description: Whether to pin the announcement as high-priority.

/applications/{applicationId}.description: Admissions applications indexed by unique ID.
